framework.name: Token Lifecycle Management (Introspection, Revocation, Refresh)
framework.description: OAuth provides standardized mechanisms for token management: introspection (RFC 7662) to check token validity and metadata, revocation (RFC 7009) to immediately invalidate tokens, and refresh tokens to obtain new access tokens without re-authentication. This creates real-time control over delegated authority.
framework.raw_quote: Token Introspection - RFC 7662, to determine the active state and meta-information of a token; Token Revocation - RFC 7009, to signal that a previously obtained token is no longer needed
